description_long: This is a single right-hand glove designed for rugged use, likely in outdoor or tactical urban environments. The glove is primarily made of a textured, durable fabric in shades of tan and brown, with reinforced knuckle and finger areas that appear to be padded or armored. The palm side features a grippy, slightly darker material for enhanced traction and wear resistance. The glove shows signs of wear and dirt, suggesting it is used for manual tasks or protection. Stitching details and paneling are visible, indicating a well-constructed, ergonomic design. There are no visible logos, closures, or reflective elements on the glove.
description: A rugged, tan and brown right-hand glove with reinforced knuckles and a grippy palm, showing signs of wear and dirt. Designed for protection and manual tasks in urban or outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the curved fingers, reinforced knuckles, and detailed stitching on the top side.
description_view_1: Palm view highlighting the textured, grippy surface and the natural curvature of the glove.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the thumb and the overall width of the glove, with visible wear on the back.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the reinforced knuckle area and the transition between different fabric textures.
